title: 'Monster Looker'
description: If you are looking for monsters, you have come to the right place !
body:
# What is 'Monster Looker' ?
 It is a modpack meant to be played with only few of my friends (reason why it is unlisted), adding plenty of monstrous creatures along vanilla + content.

This modpack doesn't have any 'dweller' expect for two or three 'basic' stalkers, and plenty of unwanted creatures have been disabled using _bad mobs_.

 
Explore the world and take pictures of the various horrors you might come accross, make a nice musket and take refuge in possibly abandoned places as if you were an urban explorer, and try to keep yourself together while going in the caves as you might never come back to talk about your trip; you can also take some pics of your mesadventures on your way and remember, to fear the environment just as much as its inhabitants ;)


 This modpack is required by both client+server

 There are ressources packs already present (to combine with programmer art) for that older feeling; you can install texture packs with even older graphics if you want, it shouldn't pose any problem with the vibe of the pack.
 
 e4mc (or essentials if I have still not figured out to use e4mc without issues) is here so if you want to bring in a friend you can (look up how to use this mod)
##  Mod list :
### Curseforge mods :
Distant friends

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/distant-friends/files/5028315](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/distant-friends/files/5028315)

Spelunker's charm II

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spelunkers-charm-ii/files/5333907](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spelunkers-charm-ii/files/5333907)

THE UNDEAD REVAMPED
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/theundead/files/6432187](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/theundead/files/6432187)

Presence Footsteps [Forge]
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/presence-footsteps-forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/presence-footsteps-forge)

Macabre - Call of False Prophets
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macabre/files/6442644](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macabre/files/6442644)

### Modrinth mods :
Check out the last version of the pack to take a look at the dependencies; that should show you the complete list of all of the mods found on modrinth which are used in this pack

Custom recommended moderner beta worldgen selections are under this (copy-paste in the right place when attempting to generate a world for the intended experience)
Here is the recommended customized moderner beta worldgen selection for the Chunk Provider :
https://docs.google.com/document/d/12Ercw09IyI3IgSHIMoO3kv6r1hiDNi0FwcRzPvJkrNQ/edit?usp=sharing
Here is the recommended customized moderner beta worldgen selection for the Biome Provider (it includes vanilla and new modded biomes which are not included in other moderner beta worldgen selections) :
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1297dWd5j4LaZNEJ3QXvHSmKEChxRWJKA6j4LdcLyDbA/edit?usp=sharing
Here is the recommended customized moderner beta selection for the Cave Biome Provider :
https://docs.google.com/document/d/17DOltFvom3ehqdcJUhe_2TLaWsnzNdzEdD0P5kIL1EQ/edit?usp=sharing

And remember to add more than 2gb or ram for that pack (recommended amount would be around 5)
